creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: ehaupt
Date: Tue Oct 22 19:50:00 2013
New Revision: 331308
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/331308

Log:
  Support staging
  
  PR:		183194
  Submitted by:	mat

Modified:
  head/net-mgmt/cidr/Makefile

Modified: head/net-mgmt/cidr/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/cidr/Makefile	Tue Oct 22 19:11:57 2013	(r331307)
+++ head/net-mgmt/cidr/Makefile	Tue Oct 22 19:50:00 2013	(r331308)
@@ -12,15 +12,13 @@ COMMENT=	RFC 1878 subnet calculator / he
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
-MAN1=		cidr.1
-PLIST_FILES=	bin/cidr
+PLIST_FILES=	bin/cidr man/man1/cidr.1.gz
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 do-build:
 	${CC} ${CFLAGS} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME}.c -o ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME}
 
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME} ${PREFIX}/bin
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/${MAN1} ${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME}.1 ${STAGEDIR}${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
